translations.source: ስኪስቶሶማያሲስ( ቢልሃርዚያ)። አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ ስኪስቶሶሚያሲስ ሥር የሰደደ የጤና መታወክን የሚያስከትል የድህነት በሽታ ነው። ኢንፌክሽኑ የሚከሰተው ሰዎች ስኪስቶሶሞች በመባል የሚታወቁትን የፓራሳይቲክ የደም ቧንቧዎች ላርቫ ቅርጾች( ሰርካሪያ) ከተበከለ ንጹህ ውሃ ጋር ሲገናኙ ነው። በአጉሊ መነጽር የሚታዩ የጎልማሳ ትሎች የሽንት ቱቦዎችን እና አንጀትን በሚያፈስሱ ደም መላሾች ውስጥ ይኖራሉ። አብዛኛዎቹ የሚጥሏቸው እንቁላሎች በጡንቻዎች ውስጥ ተገኝተዋል እና የሰውነት አካል ለእነሱ የሚሰጠው ምላሽ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት ሊያስከትል ይችላል።
translations.reference: Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) Overview: Schistosomiasis is a disease of poverty that leads to chronic ill-health. Infection is acquired when people come into contact with fresh water infested with the larval forms (cercariae) of parasitic blood flukes, known as schistosomes. The microscopic adult worms live in the veins draining the urinary tract and intestines. Most of the eggs they lay are trapped in the tissues and the body’s reaction to them can cause massive damage.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia). An Overview:** Schistosomiasis is a disease rooted in poverty that causes significant health problems. Infection occurs when people come into contact with contaminated freshwater containing Schistosoma larvae, known as cercariae, which are the larval forms of parasitic blood flukes. Adult worms, visible under a microscope, live in the blood vessels of the urinary tract and intestines. Most of the eggs they lay are found in muscles, and the body's response to them can cause significant damage.

translations.source: ስኪስቶሶሚያሲስ በዓለም ዙሪያ ወደ 240 ሚሊዮን የሚጠጉ ሰዎችን ያጠቃ ሲሆን ከ 700 ሚሊዮን በላይ ሰዎች በበሽታ በተጠቁ አካባቢዎች ይኖራሉ። አልፎ የሚይዘው በሽታ የተስፋፋው በሞቃታማ እና በገሞጂማ ጠቀስ አካባቢዎች፣ የመጠጥ ውኃ እና በቂ የንፅህና አጠባበቅ በሌላቸው ድሀ ማህበረሰቦች ውስጥ ነው። የሽንት እና የዘር ሕዋስ ስኪስቶሶማያሲስ፡ በስኪስቶሶማ ሄማቶቢየም እና በአንጀት ውስጥ ስኪስቶሶሚያሲስ በማንኛውም ፍጥረታት ኤስ. ጊኒንሲስ፣ ኤስ ኢንተርካላተም፣ ኤስ.ማንሶኒ፣ ኤስ. ጃፖኒኩም እና ኤስ.ሜኮንጊ ይከሰታል። በዓለም ዙሪያ የሚገኙ በርካታ ሚሊዮን ሰዎች በስኪስቶሶሚያሲስ ምክንያት በከባድ ሕመም ይሰቃያሉ። የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት አንቴልሚንቲክ መድኃኒቶችን የመጠቀም ስልት አሁን በሊምፋቲክ ፋይላሪሲስ ፣ ኦንኮሰርሲየስ እና በአፈር ተላላፊ ሄልማቲያሲስ ላይ ከሚደረገው ጣልቃ ገብነት ጋር በመተባበር በድሃ እና በተገለሉ ማህበረሰቦች ውስጥ ስኪስቶሶሚያሲስን ለመቆጣጠር አስችሏል።
translations.reference: Schistosomiasis affects almost 240 million people worldwide, and more than 700 million people live in endemic areas. The infection is prevalent in tropical and sub-tropical areas, in poor communities without potable water and adequate sanitation. Urogenital schistosomiasis is caused by Schistosoma haematobium and intestinal schistosomiasis by any of the organisms S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, and S. mekongi. Several million people all over the world suffer from severe morbidity as a consequence of schistosomiasis. The WHO strategy on use of anthelminthic drugs now makes it possible to control schistosomiasis in poor and marginalized communities, in conjunction with interventions against lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis and soil transmitted helminthiasis.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the English translation of the Amharic document:

Schistosomiasis affects an estimated 240 million people worldwide, with over 700 million living in areas where the disease is transmitted. The disease is widespread in warm, humid regions and among poor communities lacking access to safe water and adequate sanitation. Schistosomiasis can affect the urinary and intestinal tracts, caused by *Schistosoma haematobium* (urinary schistosomiasis) and intestinal schistosomiasis caused by *S. mansoni, S. intercalatum, S. mekongi, S. japonicum,* and *S. guineensis*. Millions of people worldwide suffer from serious illness due to schistosomiasis. The World Health Organization's strategy of using anthelmintic drugs has now enabled the control of schistosomiasis in poor and marginalized communities in conjunction with interventions for lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis, and soil-transmitted helminthiasis.

translations.source: በጣም በተስፋፋባቸው አካባቢዎች በስኪስቶሶሚያስ ምክንያት የሚመጡ ከባድ በሽታዎችን መከላከል የሚቻለው በተላላኪ ቡድኖች ላይ የተመሰረተ የማህበረሰብ ምርመራን መሰረት በማድረግ ለአደጋ የተጋለጡ ቡድኖችን በመደበኛነት በመታከም ነው። ፕራዚኳንቴል ደህንነቱ በተጠበቀ ሁኔታ ከአልበንዳዞል እና ከኢቨርሜክቲን ጋር አብሮ ተካቷል፣ እነዚህ መድሃኒቶች ለመከላከያ ኬሞቴራፒ በተናጥል ጥቅም ላይ በዋሉባቸው አካባቢዎች። ምልክቶች: የስኪስቶሶማያሲስ ምልክቶች የሚከሰቱት ሰውነታችን ለትሎች እንቍላል በሚያሳየው ምላሽ ነው። የአንጀት ስኪስቶሶማያሲስ የሆድ ሕመም፣ ተቅማጥ እና የደም መፍሰስ ሊያስከትል ይችላል። በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ ውስጥ የጉበት መጨመር የተለመደ ነው፣ እና በተደጋጋሚ በመርመሬ ክፍተት ውስጥ ፈሳሽ ከተከማቸ እና ከሆድ የደም ቧንቧዎች የደም ግፊት ጋር የተያያዘ ነው።
translations.reference: In highly endemic areas, severe morbidity due to schistosomiasis can be prevented by regular treatment of at risk groups targeted based on community diagnosis based on sentinel groups. Praziquantel has been safely co-administered with albendazole and ivermectin, in areas where these drugs have been used separately for preventive chemotherapy. Symptoms: Symptoms of schistosomiasis are caused by the body’s reaction to the worms' eggs. Intestinal schistosomiasis can result in abdominal pain, diarrhoea, and blood in the stool. Liver enlargement is common in advanced cases, and is frequently associated with an accumulation of fluid in the peritoneal cavity and hypertension of the abdominal blood vessels.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Preventing severe diseases caused by schistosomiasis in highly endemic areas can be achieved by regularly treating at-risk populations based on a community screening system focused on transmission groups. Praziquantel is administered safely in combination with albendazole and ivermectin, particularly in areas where these medications are used for mass chemoprophylaxis. Symptoms: The symptoms of schistosomiasis result from the body's response to the presence of worms. Intestinal schistosomiasis can cause abdominal pain, diarrhea, and bleeding. Severely, liver enlargement is common, and fluid accumulates frequently in the ascites space, associated with high blood pressure in the portal vein of the abdomen."

translations.source: በእንደዚህ ዓይነት ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ የጣፍያ መጨመርም ሊኖር ይችላል። የዩሮጂንታል ስኪስቶሶማሲስ ንቡር ምልክት ሄማቱሪያ (በሽንት ውስጥ ያለ ደም) ነው። የፊኛ እና የሽንት ቧንቧ ውጥረት እና የኩላሊት መጎዳት አንዳንድ ጊዜ በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ ውስጥ በምርመራ ይታወቃሉ። የፊኛ ካንሰር በኋለኞቹ ደረጃዎች ውስጥ ሌላው ሊከሰት የሚችል ውስብስብ ነገር ነው። በሴቶች ላይ የሽንት እና የወሊድ መከላከያ ሺስቶሶሚያሲስ በመራብያ ብልቶች፣ በሴት ብልት ደም መፍሰስ፣ በግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት ወቅት ህመም እና በሴት ብልት ውስጥ ያሉ እጢዎች ሊታዩ ይችላሉ።
translations.reference: In such cases there may also be enlargement of the spleen. The classic sign of urogenital schistosomiasis is haematuria (blood in urine). Fibrosis of the bladder and ureter, and kidney damage are sometimes diagnosed in advanced cases. Bladder cancer is another possible complication in the later stages. In women, urogenital schistosomiasis may present with genital lesions, vaginal bleeding, pain during sexual intercourse, and nodules in the vulva.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"In such circumstances, there may also be an increase in pigmentation. The main sign of urogenital schistosomiasis is hematuria (blood in the urine). Bladder and urethra tension, and kidney damage, can sometimes be severely observed during examination. Cancer of the bladder can be another complication that can occur in the later stages. In women, urogenital schistosomiasis can manifest as itchy vulvar lesions, vaginal bleeding, pain during sexual intercourse, and nodules in the vagina."

**Explanation of some choices:**

*   **"Pigmentation"** is used to translate "የጣፍያ መጨመር" as it refers to a darkening or discoloration of the skin.
*   **"Urogenital schistosomiasis"** is the standard medical term for the disease being discussed.
*   **"Vaginal bleeding"** is a more accurate translation of "ሴት ብልት ደም መፍሰስ" than simply "bleeding."
*   **"Nodules"** is used to translate "እጢዎች" which refers to small lumps or bumps.



I hope this translation is helpful!

translations.source: በወንዶች ላይ የዘር ፈሳሽ ስኪስቶሶማሲስ ቧንቧዎች፣ የፕሮስቴት እና ሌሎች የአካል ክፍሎች በሽታን ሊያስከትል ይችላል። ይህ በሽታ መሃንነትን ጨምሮ ሌሎች የረጅም ጊዜ የማይመለሱ መዘዞችን ሊያስከትል ይችላል። የስኪስቶሶማያሲስ ኢኮኖሚያዊና የጤና ተጽዕኖ ከፍተኛ ሲሆን በሽታው ከሚገድለው በላይ የአካል ጉዳተኛ ያደርጋል። በልጆች ላይ፣ ስኪስቶሶሚሲስ የደም ማነስ፣ የመቀነስ እና የመማር ችሎታን ሊያዳክም ይችላል፣ ምንም እንኳን ውጤቶቹ ብዙውን ጊዜ በሕክምና የሚመለሱ ናቸው። ህክምና፦ ፕራዚኳንቴል ለሁሉም ዓይነት ስኪስቶሶማያሲስ የሚመከር ህክምና ነው።
translations.reference: In men, urogenital schistosomiasis can induce pathology of the seminal vesicles, prostate, and other organs. This disease may also have other long-term irreversible consequences, including infertility. The economic and health effects of schistosomiasis are considerable and the disease disables more than it kills. In children, schistosomiasis can cause anaemia, stunting and a reduced ability to learn, although the effects are usually reversible with treatment. Treatment: Praziquantel is the recommended treatment against all forms of schistosomiasis.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the English translation of the Amharic document:

"Schistosomiasis, a parasitic disease, can affect men's urinary tract, prostate, and other organs. This disease can lead to other long-term, irreversible consequences, including infertility. The economic and health impact of schistosomiasis is significant; it disables more people than it kills. In children, schistosomiasis can impair anemia, growth, and learning ability, although the effects are often treatable with medical intervention. Treatment: Praziquantel is the recommended treatment for all types of schistosomiasis."

translations.source: ውጤታማ፣ ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ እና ርካሽ ነው። ምንም እንኳን ከህክምና በኋላ ዳግም አልፎ የሚይዝ በሽታ ሊከሰት ቢችልም ህክምናው በልጅነት ጊዜ ሲጀመር እና ሲደጋገም ከባድ በሽታ የመያዝ አደጋ ይቀንሳል አልፎ ተርፎም ይስተካከላል። ብራዚል፣ ካምቦዲያ፣ ቻይና፣ ግብፅ፣ ሞሪሺየስ፣ ኢራን እስላማዊ ሪፐብሊክ፣ ኦማን፣ ዮርዳኖስ፣ ሳውዲ አረቢያ፣ ሞሮኮ፣ ቱኒዚያ ወዘተ ጨምሮ የሺስቶሶማያሲስ ቁጥጥር ላለፉት 40 ዓመታት በተሳካ ሁኔታ ተተግብሯል። በቡሩንዲ፣ ቡርኪናፋሶ፣ ጋና፣ ኒጀር፣ ሩዋንዳ፣ ሴራሊዮን፣ የተባበሩት ታንዛኒያ ሪፐብሊክ እና የመን የስኪስቶሶሚያሲስ ሕክምናን በአገር አቀፍ ደረጃ ማሳደግ ተችሏል እና በጥቂት ዓመታት ውስጥ በሽታው ላይ ተፅዕኖ መፍጠር ተችሏል። በብዙ አገሮች ውስጥ የስርጭት ሁኔታ ግምገማ ያስፈልጋል።
translations.reference: It is effective, safe, and low-cost. Even though re-infection may occur after treatment, the risk of developing severe disease is diminished and even reversed when treatment is initiated and repeated in childhood. Schistosomiasis control has been successfully implemented over the past 40 years in several countries, including Brazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, etc. In Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, the United Republic of Tanzania, and Yemen, it has been possible to scale-up schistosomiasis treatment to the national level and have an impact on the disease in a few years. An assessment of the status of transmission is required in several countries.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"It is effective, safe, and affordable. Although a relapse of the disease may occur after treatment, the risk of developing a severe illness is reduced if treatment is started and repeated in childhood, and can even be corrected. It has been successfully implemented for the past 40 years in the control of schistosomiasis, including Brazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, etc. In Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, United Republic of Tanzania, and Yemen, schistosomiasis treatment has been scaled up nationwide and has been able to impact the disease within a few years. Assessment of the transmission situation is needed in many countries."

translations.source: ባለፉት 10 ዓመታት አብዛኛዎቹ ለአደጋ የተጋለጡ ሰዎች በሚኖሩባቸው በርካታ ከሰሃራ በታች ባሉ ሃገራት የህክምና ዘመቻዎች ተካሂደዋል።
translations.reference: Over the past 10 years, there has been scale-up of treatment campaigns in a number of sub-Saharan countries, where most of those at risk live.
translations.hypothesis: Over the past 10 years, medical campaigns have been conducted in numerous sub-Saharan African countries where many people are vulnerable to disasters.

translations.source: ለጤንነት የራስ-እንክብካቤ ጣልቃ ገብነቶች። አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ እራስን መንከባከብ የግለሰቦች፣ ቤተሰቦች እና ማህበረሰቦች ጤናን ማስተዋወቅ፣ በሽታን መከላከል፣ ጤናን መጠበቅ እና ከጤና ሰራተኛ ድጋፍ ጋር ወይም ያለ ድጋፍ በሽታን እና አካል ጉዳተኝነትን መቋቋም ነው።በአሁኑ ወቅት 3 ነጥብ 6 ቢሊዮን ሰዎች ማለትም ከዓለም ሕዝብ ግማሽ ያህሉ መሰረታዊ የጤና አገልግሎት አያገኙም። የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ለሁሉም ሃገራት እና ኢኮኖሚያዊ አካባቢዎች የራስ-እንክብካቤ ጣልቃ ገብነትን ይመክራል፣ ሁለንተናዊ የጤና ሽፋን ለመድረስ፣ ጤናን ለማስተዋወቅ፣ ዓለምን ደኅንነት ለመጠበቅ እና ተጋላጭ የሆኑትን ለማገልገል ወሳኝ መንገድ ነው። የራስ እንክብካቤ ግለሰቦች የራሳቸውን የጤና እንክብካቤ ለማስተዳደር ንቁ ወኪሎች እንደሆኑ ይገነዘባል፣ በጤና ማበረታቻ፣ በበሽታ መከላከል እና ቊጥጥር፣ በራስ-መድኃኒት፣ ጥገኛ ለሆኑ ሰዎች እንክብካቤ መስጠት እና ማገገምን ጨምሮ። ራስን የመንከባከብ ጣልቃገብነቶች በማስረጃ ላይ የተመሰረቱ፣ እራስን መንከባከብን የሚደግፉ ጥራት ያላቸው መሳሪያዎች ናቸው።
translations.reference: Self-care interventions for health Overview: Self-care is the ability of individuals, families and communities to promote health, prevent disease, maintain health, and cope with illness and disability with or without the support of a health worker.Currently 3.6 billion people – half of the world – lack access to essential health services. WHO recommends self-care interventions for every country and economic setting, as a critical path to reach universal health coverage, promote health, keep the world safe, and serve the vulnerable. Self-care recognises individuals as active agents in managing their own health care, in areas including health promotion; disease prevention and control; self-medication; providing care to dependent persons, and rehabilitation, including palliative care. Self-care interventions are evidence-based, quality tools that support self-care.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**Self-Care Interventions for Health. An Overview:** Self-care is promoting health, preventing disease, protecting health, and coping with illness and disability with or without health worker support for individuals, families, and communities. Currently, 3.6 billion people, or roughly half of the world’s population, do not receive essential health services. The World Health Organization recommends self-care interventions for all countries and economic settings as a crucial pathway to achieving universal health coverage, promoting health, safeguarding global safety, and serving vulnerable populations. Self-care recognizes individuals as active agents in managing their own health, including health promotion, disease prevention and control, self-medication, providing care for dependents, and recovery. Self-care interventions are evidence-based, quality tools that support self-care.

translations.source: ከመደበኛ የጤና አገልግሎቶች ውጭ ሙሉ በሙሉ ወይም በከፊል ሊገኙ የሚችሉ መድኃኒቶችን፣ የምክር፣ የምርመራ እና/ወይም ዲጂታል ቴክኖሎጂዎችን ያካትታሉ። እንደ ጣልቃ ገብነቱ በመመርኮዝ በጤና ባለሙያዎች ቀጥተኛ ቊጥጥር ወይም ያለ እነሱ ጥቅም ላይ ሊውሉ ይችላሉ። እራስን መንከባከብ የሚከተሉትን ማድረግ ይችላል: ግለሰቦች እና ማህበረሰቦች ጤናቸውን እና ደህንነታቸውን እንዲያስተዳድሩ ማስቻል። የሀገር ውስጥ ሀብትን በብቃት ለጤና በማዋል ብሄራዊ ተቋማትን ማጠናከር።
translations.reference: They include medicines, counselling, diagnostics and/or digital technologies which can be accessed fully or partially outside of formal health services. Depending on the intervention, they can be used with or without the direct supervision of health workers. Self-care interventions can: empower individuals and communities to manage their health and well-being strengthen national institutions with efficient use of domestic resources for health
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"It includes medications, counseling, examinations, and/or digital technologies that can be accessed entirely or partially outside of regular health services. They can be used with or without the direct supervision of health professionals, depending on the level of intervention. Self-care can enable individuals and communities to manage their health and safety, and can strengthen national institutions by efficiently allocating domestic resources for health."

translations.source: መጀመሪያ ደረጃ የጤና እንክብካቤን( ፒኤችሲ) ማሻሻል እና ሁለንተናዊ የጤና ሽፋንን ለማሳካት አስተዋጽኦ ማድረግ። አቀራረብ፡ ሰዎችን ያማከለ አካሄድ ራስን የመንከባከብ ጣልቃገብነት የግለሰቦችን ፍላጎቶች እና መብቶችን የሚደግፍ ህዝብን ያማከለ አካሄድ በሰብአዊ መብቶች እና በጾታ እኩልነት ላይ የተመሰረተ ነው። ይህ ለእያንዳንዱ ሰው ጤንነት እና ደኅንነት ሁለንተናዊ አቀራረብ ነው፣ በሕይወት ዘመናቸው ውስጥ ያሉትን ሁኔታዎች፣ ፍላጐቶች እና ምኞቶች እንዲሁም የሚኖሩበትን አካባቢ ከግምት ውስጥ ያስገባል። ራስን መንከባከብ ማለት ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ እና ደጋፊ በሆነ አከባቢ ውስጥ በሽታዎችን ለመከላከል እና ለማከም የግለሰቦች ኃይል ነው። የጤና አጠባበቅ ስርዓቱን አይተካም፣ይልቁንም ለጤና እንክብካቤ ተጨማሪ ምርጫዎችን እና አማራጮችን ይሰጣል።
translations.reference: improve primary healthcare (PHC) and contribute to achieving UHC Approach: A people-centred approach Self-care interventions support the needs and rights of individuals through a people-centred approach that is grounded in human rights and gender equality. This is a holistic approach to the health and well-being of each person, taking account of their circumstances, needs and desires across a lifetime, as well as the environment in which they live. Self-care is the power of individuals to prevent and treat diseases themselves, in the context of a safe and supportive enabling environment. It does not replace the health care system, but instead provides additional choices and options for health care.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Improving Primary Health Care (PHC) and contributing to achieving universal health coverage. Approach: A people-centered approach that supports individual needs and rights, based on human rights and gender equality. This is a holistic approach to everyone's health and well-being, taking into account the circumstances, needs, and aspirations throughout their lives, as well as the environment in which they live. Self-care is the power of individuals to prevent and treat diseases in a safe and supportive environment. It does not replace the health care system; rather, it provides additional options and alternatives for health care."

translations.source: የሚገኝ፣ ተደራሽ፣ ተመጣጣኝ፣ ተቀባይነት ያለው እና ጥሩ ጥራት ያለው ራስን የመንከባከብ ጣልቃገብነት የሰዎችን የጤና መብት የማስተዋወቅ እና የመጠበቅ ዋና አካላት ናቸው። ራስን የመንከባከብ ጣልቃገብነት የጤና አገልግሎት አሰጣጥን፣ ተደራሽነትን እና ሽፋን ውጤታማነት ያሻሽላል። ይህ የሚደግፉ ህጎች እና መመሪያዎች፣ የጤና ገንዘብ አያያዝ፣ ቊጥጥር የተደረገባቸው ጥራት ያላቸው ምርቶች እና ጣልቃ ገብነቶች እንዲሁም የግለሰቦችን ተሳትፎ የሚያበረታታ ትምህርት እንዲሁም ግላዊነት እና ምስጢራዊነት ይጠይቃል። የሰብዓዊ መብቶች ጒዳዮች እያንዳንዱ ሰው የጤና፣ የመረጃና ራሱን ችሎ የመወሰን መብቱን በተሻለ መንገድ በመጠቀም ዓመፅን፣ አስገዳጅነትን፣ መገለልንና መድልዎን ለመቀነስ ይረዳሉ። የአደጋ ጊዜ አውድ
translations.reference: Available, accessible, affordable, acceptable and good quality self-care interventions are core components of promoting and protecting people’s right to health. Self-care interventions can improve the efficiency of health service delivery, access and coverage. This requires supportive laws and policies, health financing, regulated quality products and interventions, and education which promotes the participation of individuals, as well as privacy and confidentiality. Human rights considerations help to reduce violence, coercion, stigma and discrimination by improving each person’s exercise of their right to health, information, and independent decision-making. Emergency context
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Accessible, reachable, comparable, acceptable, and of good quality self-care interventions are key components in promoting and protecting people's right to health. Self-care interventions improve health service delivery, accessibility, and effectiveness of coverage. This requires supportive laws and guidelines, health financing, regulated quality products and interventions, as well as education that encourages individual participation, and privacy and confidentiality. Human rights issues help reduce rebellion, coercion, marginalization, and discrimination by enabling everyone to better utilize their rights to health, information, and self-determination. Emergency framework"

**Notes on the translation:**

*   I've aimed for accuracy while maintaining readability in English.
*   Some Amharic words have multiple possible English translations depending on the context. I've chosen the options that best fit the overall meaning of the passage.
*   The final sentence "የአደጋ ጊዜ አውድ" translates to "Emergency framework."

translations.source: ወረርሽኞች እና ሰብአዊ ቀውሶች ነባር የጤና ሥርዓቶች በተዳከሙባቸው ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ ብዙውን ጊዜ ግለሰቦች እና ማህበረሰቦች ጤንነታቸውን እንዲያስተዳድሩ ታይቶ የማይታወቅ ፍላጐት አለ። ከተለመደው የጤና ዘርፍ ምላሽ በላይ የሚሄዱ የፈጠራ ስልቶች በአስቸኳይ ያስፈልጋሉ ምክንያቱም: የበሽታ ወረርሽኝ የማያቋርጥ ዓለም አቀፍ ስጋት ሲሆን በአሁኑ ጊዜ 274 ሚሊዮን ሰዎች የሰብአዊ እርዳታ እና ጥበቃ ያስፈልጋቸዋል። በዓለም ዙሪያ ቢያንስ 400 ሚሊዮን ሰዎች በጣም አስፈላጊ ለሆኑ የጤና አገልግሎቶች መዳረሻ የላቸውም። ከአምስት የዓለም ሕዝብ ውስጥ አንዱ በአሁኑ ወቅት በሰብዓዊ ቀውስ ውስጥ የሚኖር ሲሆን የጤና ሥርዓቶች አስፈላጊ አገልግሎቶችን ለማቅረብ ፈታኝ ናቸው።
translations.reference: Pandemics and humanitarian crisesIn situations where existing health systems are stretched, there is often an unprecedented demand on individuals and communities to manage their health. Innovative strategies that go beyond the conventional health sector response is urgently needed given that: a record 274 million people are currently in need of humanitarian assistance and protection and disease outbreaks are a constant global threat at least 400 million people worldwide lack access to the most essential health services. 1 in 5 of the world’s population are now living in humanitarian crises, in which health systems are challenged to deliver essential services.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"In situations where health systems are weakened, there is often an unprecedented need for individuals and communities to manage their own health. Creative strategies that go beyond the usual health sector response are urgently needed because: pandemic is a constant global threat, and currently 274 million people need humanitarian assistance and protection. At least 400 million people worldwide lack access to essential health services. One in five of the world's population is currently living in humanitarian crises, making it challenging for health systems to provide essential services."

**Notes on the translation:**

*   I aimed for accuracy and clarity while maintaining a natural English flow.
*   I've tried to capture the tone and emphasis of the original Amharic text.
*   "ሰብአዊ ቀውሶች" is translated as "humanitarian crises" which is the standard English term.

translations.source: የራስ-እንክብካቤ ጣልቃ ገብነቶች እንደ ድጋፍ ሰጭ የጤና ሥርዓት አካል ሆነው ለተለመደው የጤና ተቋም ወይም በጤና ሠራተኛ ላይ ለተመሰረቱ አገልግሎቶች ጠቃሚ፣ ተጨማሪ አማራጮችን ሊያቀርቡ ይችላሉ። ይህ በተለይ እንደ ኮቪድ-19 ባሉ ወረርሽኞች ወቅት ራስን ማግለል እና አካላዊ ርቀትን የመጠበቅ እርምጃዎች ሰዎች መደበኛ የጤና እንክብካቤ አገልግሎቶቻቸውን እና መድሃኒቶቻቸውን እንዲያገኙ አስቸጋሪ ሲያደርጉ እና ብሔራዊ የጤና ሥርዓቶች ሊቋረጡ ሲችሉ በጣም አስፈላጊ ነው። የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ለኮቪድ-19 አስፈላጊ የሆኑ የጤና አገልግሎቶችን ለማቆየት በተልኳዊ መመሪያው ውስጥ የራስ-እንክብካቤ ጣልቃ-ገብነትን እንደ ቅድሚያ የሚሰጡ እርምጃዎች አካቷል.
translations.reference: Self-care interventions can provide valuable, additional options to the usual health facility- or health worker-based services, as part of a supportive health system. This is particularly relevant during a pandemic like COVID-19, when self-isolation and physical distancing measures make it more difficult for people to access their normal health care services and medications and national health systems can be disrupted. WHO includes self-care interventions as priority actions in operational guidance on maintaining essential health services for the COVID-19 context.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Self-care interventions can offer valuable, supplementary options for services delivered through a typical health facility or based on health workers, acting as a component of a supportive health system. This is particularly crucial during pandemics like COVID-19, when measures of self-isolation and physical distancing can make it difficult for people to access their regular health care services and medications, and when national health systems can be disrupted. The World Health Organization has included self-care interventions as priority actions in its guidance for maintaining essential health services for COVID-19."

translations.source: ሴፕሲስ አጠቃላይ እይታ: ሴፕሲስ ለሕይወት አስጊ የሆነ በሽታ ሲሆን ሰውነት ለኢንፌክሽን የሚሰጠው ምላሽ በራሱ ሕብረ ህዋሳት እና አካላት ላይ ጕዳት ያስከትላል። ብዙውን ጊዜ በዓለም ዙሪያ ለብዙ ተላላፊ በሽታዎች የመጨረሻው የሞት መንገድ ነው። ይህ በሽታ በአስተናጋጁ ኢንፌክሽን ላይ በተፈጠረው ያልተስተካከለ ምላሽ ምክንያት የሚከሰት የአካል ብልሹነት ሲሆን ቶሎ ካልተገኘ እና ቶሎ ካልተያዘ ወደ ሴፕቲክ ድንጋጤ፣ ብዙ የአካል ብልሽት እና ሞት ሊያመራ ይችላል። ምንም እንኳን የሴፕሲስን ዓለም አቀፍ ኤፒዲሚዮሎጂካል ሸክም ትክክለኛ ግምት ለማወቅ አስቸጋሪ ቢሆንም በቅርብ ጊዜ የወጣ ሳይንሳዊ ህትመት እንደዘገበው ሴፕሲስ በ 49 ሚሊዮን የሚገመቱ ሰዎችን እንደሚያጠቃ እና በየዓመቱ በአለም አቀፍ ደረጃ 11 ሚሊዮን ለሞት ይዳርጋል።
translations.reference: Sepsis Overview: Sepsis is a life-threatening condition that arises when the body’s response to infection causes injury to its own tissues and organs. It is frequently a final common pathway to death for many infectious diseases worldwide. It involves organ dysfunction caused by a dysregulated host response to infection and if not recognized early and managed promptly, it can lead to septic shock, multiple organ failure and death. Although a precise estimate of the global epidemiological burden of sepsis is difficult to ascertain, a recent scientific publication reported that sepsis affects an estimated 49 million people and causes 11 million deaths globally every year.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**Sepsis: An Overview:** Sepsis is a life-threatening condition where the body's response to an infection damages its own tissues and organs. It is often the final pathway to death for many infectious diseases around the world. This is a syndrome caused by a dysregulated response to an inciting infection, and if not promptly recognized and treated, it can lead to septic shock, multiple organ failure, and death. Although it is difficult to know the exact global epidemiological burden of sepsis, a recent scientific publication reported that it affects an estimated 49 million people and results in 11 million deaths worldwide each year.

translations.source: በህብረተሰቡ ውስጥ ሴፕሲስ ብዙውን ጊዜ የተለመዱ እና ሊከላከሉ የሚችሉ ኢንፌክሽኖች ክሊኒካዊ መባባስ ነው። በተጨማሪም ሴፕሲስ በተደጋጋሚ በጤና አጠባበቅ ተቋማት ውስጥ በተከሰቱ ኢንፌክሽኖች ይከሰታል, እነዚህም በእንክብካቤ አሰጣጥ ወቅት በጣም በተደጋጋሚ ከሚከሰቱት አሉታዊ ክስተቶች አንዱ ሲሆን በየዓመቱ በዓለም ዙሪያ በመቶ ሚሊዮኖች የሚቆጠሩ ታካሚዎችን ይጎዳሉ. በእርግዝና ወቅት፣ በሚወልዱበት ጊዜ ወይም ከወለዱ በኋላ፣ ወይም ፅንስ ካስወገደ በኋላ ሴፕሲስ ከተከሰተ የእናቶች ሴስሲስ ይባላል። አዲስ በተወለዱ ሕፃናት ላይ የሚከሰት ሴፕሲስ የአራስ ሴፕሲስ ይባላል። በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ መከላከል የሚቻል ቢሆንም የእናቶች እና አራስ ሴፕሲስ ለነፍሰ ጡር እናቶች እና አዲስ ለሚወለዱ ሕፃናት ሞት ምክንያት ሆኖ ቀጥሏል።
translations.reference: In the community setting, sepsis often presents as the clinical deterioration of common and preventable infections. Sepsis also frequently results from infections acquired in health care settings, which are one of the most frequent adverse events during care delivery and affect hundreds of millions of patients worldwide every year. If sepsis develops during pregnancy, while or after giving birth, or after an abortion, it is called maternal sepsis. Sepsis in newborn babies is called neonatal sepsis. Despite being highly preventable, maternal and neonatal sepsis continues to be a major cause of death for pregnant women and newborn babies.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Sepsis in the community is often a clinical complication of common and preventable infections. Furthermore, sepsis frequently occurs in healthcare facilities, and these are among the most common adverse events during care delivery, affecting tens of millions of patients worldwide each year. Sepsis occurring during pregnancy, at childbirth, or postpartum, or after induced abortion is called maternal sepsis. Sepsis occurring in newborns is called neonatal sepsis. Although highly preventable, maternal and neonatal sepsis continue to be a cause of death for pregnant women and newborns."

translations.source: ምልክቶች፡ ሴፕሲስ የሕክምና ድንገተኛ አደጋ ሲሆን ተጨማሪ ችግሮችን ወይም ሞትን ለመከላከል አፋጣኝ ክትትል ያስፈልገዋል። አንዳንድ ጊዜ የተለያዩ የማስጠንቀቂያ ምልክቶችን ሊያሳይ ይችላል፣ አንዳንዶቹ ከሌሎች ሁኔታዎች ጋር የተሳሳተ መለያ ሊያስከትሉ ይችላሉ። የሴፕቲክ ኢንፌክሽን ትኩሳትን ሊያመጣ ይችላል፣ ነገር ግን ዝቅተኛ የሰውነት ሙቀት፣ ጉንፋን እና መንቀጥቀጥ ሊያስከትል ይችላል። የመተንፈስ ችግር ወይም ፈጣን የመተንፈስ ችግር፣ እንዲሁም የልብ ምት መጨመር፣ ወይም በተቃራኒው ደካማ የልብ ምት እና ዝቅተኛ የደም ግፊት ሊኖር ይችላል። የሽንት መጠን መቀነስ፣ እንዲሁም ሰማያዊ ቀለም ያለው፣ ቀላ ያለ ወይም ያልተለመደ ቆዳ፣ እና የተለወጠ የአእምሮ ሁኔታን ሊያስከትል ይችላል።
translations.reference: Symptoms: Sepsis is a medical emergency and requires immediate attention to prevent further complications or death. It may present different warning signs and symptoms at times, some of which may cause misidentification with other conditions. A septic infection may cause a fever, but may also cause low body temperature, cold extremities and shivering. There may be difficulty breathing or rapid breathing, as well as an increased heart rate, or conversely a weak pulse and low blood pressure. It may cause low urine output, as well as blue-tinted, mottled or abnormally pale skin, and an altered mental state.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the English translation of the Amharic document:

**Symptoms:** Sepsis is a medical emergency that requires prompt monitoring to prevent further complications or death. It can sometimes present with various warning signs, some of which may be mistaken for other conditions. Septic infection can cause a fever, but it can also lead to low body temperature, chills, and shivering. There may be difficulty breathing or rapid breathing, as well as an increased heart rate, or conversely, a weak heart rate and low blood pressure. It can also result in decreased urine output, as well as bluish, pale, or discolored skin, and altered mental status.

translations.source: በመጨረሻም ከፍተኛ የሆነ የሰውነት ሕመም ወይም አለመመቸት ሊያስከትል ይችላል ይህም ለጉንፋን ወይም ለምግብ መመረዝ በቀላሉ ግራ ሊጋባ ይችላል። በልጆች ላይ ሴፕሲስ በጣም ፈጣን በሆነ የአተነፋፈስ ፍጥነት፣ የሆድ እብጠት፣ ቀላ ያለ ቆዳ፣ ድካም ወይም የመንቃት ችግር ወይም ያልተለመደ ቀዝቃዛ ስሜት ሊታይ ይችላል። ከ 5 አመት በታች ለሆኑ ህጻናት የመመገብ ችግር, ተደጋጋሚ ማስታወክ ወይም የሽንት እጥረት ሊያስከትል ይችላል። ሴፕሲስን መጠራጠር እና በፍጥነት እርምጃ መውሰድ ለቅድመ እውቅና እና ምርመራ አስፈላጊ ነው. ሕክምና፡ ምልክቶችን አስቀድሞ ለይቶ ማወቅ እና ተገቢውን ክሊኒካዊ አስተዳደር በወቅቱ ማቋቋም የሴፕሲስን አደጋ እና ተጽእኖ ለመቀነስ ወሳኝ ነገሮች ናቸው።
translations.reference: Finally, it may cause extreme body pain or discomfort, which makes it easy to confuse for influenza or food poisoning. In children, sepsis may present through very fast breathing, convulsions, pale skin, lethargy or difficulty waking up or feeling abnormally cold to the touch. For children under 5 years, it may cause difficulty feeding, repeated vomiting or a lack of urination. Suspecting sepsis and acting quickly is crucial for early recognition and diagnosis. Treatment: Early identification of symptoms and timely establishment of appropriate clinical management are critical elements to reducing the risk and impact of sepsis.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"It can ultimately lead to severe illness or discomfort, which can easily be confused with a fever or loss of appetite. In children, sepsis may manifest with rapid breathing, abdominal distension, pale skin, weakness or difficulty waking up, or an unusual cold sensation. In children under 5 years of age, it can cause feeding difficulties, frequent vomiting, or decreased urination. Suspecting sepsis and taking prompt action is essential for early recognition and examination. Treatment: Early identification of symptoms and timely establishment of appropriate clinical management are crucial factors in reducing the risk and impact of sepsis."

translations.source: እንደ ሲ ሪአክቲቭ ፕሮቲን እና ፕሮካልሲቶኒን ያሉ አንዳንድ ባዮማርከርን መለየት በሽታውን በመመርመር ረገድ ውጤታማ ሊሆን ይችላል። ከቀድሞ ምርመራ በኋላ ወደ ሴፕሲስ የሚያመራ ኢንፌክሽን መንስኤ የሆነ በሽታ አምጪ ተህዋስያንን ለመለየት የሚረዱ ምርመራዎች ዒላማ የተደረገ የፀረ-ተህዋሲያን ህክምናን ለመምራት አስፈላጊ ናቸው። ሴፕሲስ ከተለየ በኋላ በአንድ ሰዓት ውስጥ ተገቢው ፀረ ጀርም ህክምና (ለምሳሌ አንቲባዮቲክስ እና ፀረ-ፈንገስ) መሰጠት አለበት። የፀረ-ተህዋሲያን መቋቋም( ኤኤምአር) የሴፕሲስ ክሊኒካዊ አያያዝን አደጋ ላይ ሊጥል ይችላል ምክንያቱም ብዙውን ጊዜ ተጨባጭ አንቲባዮቲክ ህክምና ያስፈልጋል። በመጀመሪያው ደረጃ ፈሳሽ ማስነሳት አስፈላጊ ነው እናም የሕብረ ህዋሳትን መድማት ለማሻሻል እና ለማቆየት የቫዞፕሬሰሮች አስፈላጊ ሊሆኑ ይችላሉ።
translations.reference: The detection of some biomarkers, such as C reactive protein and procalcitonin, can be effective in diagnosing the condition. After early recognition, diagnostics to help identify a causal pathogen of infection leading to sepsis are important to guide targeted antimicrobial treatment. The appropriate antimicrobial therapy (for example, antibiotics and antifungals) should be given within one hour of sepsis identification. Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) can jeopardize clinical management of sepsis because empirical antibiotic treatment is often required. Early fluid resuscitation is important in the initial phase and vasopressors may be required to improve and maintain tissue perfusion.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Identifying certain biomarkers, such as C-reactive protein and procalcitonin, can be effective in investigating the disease. Diagnostic tests that help identify pathogens causing infection leading to sepsis are essential to guide targeted antimicrobial therapy. After sepsis is diagnosed, appropriate antimicrobial treatment (e.g., antibiotics and antifungals) should be administered within one hour. Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) can jeopardize the clinical management of sepsis because empirical antibiotic therapy is often required. Initially, fluid resuscitation is essential, and vasopressors may be necessary to improve and maintain tissue perfusion."

translations.source: ሴፕሲስን ለመከላከል ሁለት ዋና ዋና እርምጃዎች አሉ- ጥቃቅን ተህዋስያን ስርጭትንና ኢንፌክሽንን መከላከል ወደ ሴፕሲስ የሚሸጋገር ኢንፌክሽንን መከላከል በማህበረሰቡ ውስጥ የሴፕሲስ መከላከል ውጤታማ የንፅህና አጠባበቅ ልምዶችን በመጠቀም፣ የንፅህና እና የውኃ ጥራት እና ተገኝነትን በማሻሻል፣ ክትባቶችን በተለይም ለከፍተኛ አደጋ ተጋላጭ ለሆኑ እንዲሁም ለአራስ ሕፃናት ጡት ማጥባትን ጨምሮ ተገቢ አመጋገብን በማቅረብ ይደገፋል። በጤና አጠባበቅ ተቋማት ውስጥ መከላከል የኢንፌክሽን መከላከል እና ቁጥጥር (አይፒሲ) መርሃግብሮችን ፣ ውጤታማ የንፅህና አጠባበቅ ልምዶችን እና ንጹህ እና በደንብ በሚሠሩ መሣሪያዎች ላይ የተመሠረተ ነው።
translations.reference: There are two main steps to preventing sepsis: Prevention of microbial transmission and infection Prevention of an infection evolving into sepsis Within the community, sepsis prevention is assisted through the use of effective hygiene practices, improving sanitation and water quality and availability, providing access to vaccines, particularly for those at high risk, as well as appropriate nutrition, including breastfeeding for newborns. Prevention in health care facilities relies on infection prevention and control (IPC) programmes, effective hygiene practices, and clean, well-functioning equipment.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"There are two main measures to prevent sepsis – preventing the spread of microorganisms and preventing infection from progressing to sepsis. Sepsis prevention in the community is supported by using effective hygiene practices, improving hygiene and water quality and availability, and providing appropriate nutrition, especially vaccinations, and breastfeeding for infants at high risk. Prevention in healthcare facilities is based on infection prevention and control (IPC) programs, effective hygiene practices, and clean and well-maintained equipment."

translations.source: የወሲብ ጤና አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ የወሲብ ጤና ለግለሰቦች፣ ጥንዶች እና ቤተሰቦች አጠቃላይ ጤና እና ደህንነት፣ እንዲሁም ለማህበረሰቦች እና ሀገራት ማህበራዊ እና ኢኮኖሚያዊ እድገት መሰረታዊ ነው። ወሲባዊ ጤንነት አዎንታዊ በሆነ መልኩ ሲታይ ለወሲባዊነት እና ለወሲባዊ ግንኙነቶች አዎንታዊ እና አክብሮት ያለው አቀራረብን እንዲሁም ከአስገዳጅነት፣ ከአድልዎ እና ከዓመፅ ነጻ የሆነ አስደሳች እና ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ የወሲብ ልምዶችን የማግኘት ዕድልን ይጠይቃል። የወንዶች እና የሴቶች የፆታ ጤንነት እና ደኅንነት የማግኘት ችሎታ የሚወሰነው በሚከተሉት ላይ ነው: ስለ ወሲብ እና ወሲባዊነት አጠቃላይ ጥሩ ጥራት ያለው መረጃ ማግኘት;
translations.reference: Sexual health Overview: Sexual health is fundamental to the overall health and well-being of individuals, couples and families, and to the social and economic development of communities and countries. Sexual health, when viewed affirmatively, requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and well-being depends on their: access to comprehensive, good-quality information about sex and sexuality;
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**A Comprehensive Look at Sexual Health:** Sexual health is fundamental to the overall health and well-being of individuals, couples, and families, as well as to the social and economic development of communities and countries. Positive sexual health involves a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the opportunity to experience pleasurable and safe sexual practices free from coercion, exploitation, and abuse. The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and safety depends on: obtaining good quality, comprehensive information about sex and sexuality;

translations.source: ሊያጋጥሟቸው ስለሚችሉት አደጋዎች እና ጥንቃቄ የጎደለው የግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት ለሚያስከትለው መዘዝ ተጋላጭነታቸውን ማወቅ; የወሲብ ጤና አጠባበቅ የማግኘት ችሎታ; የጾታዊ ጤናን በሚያረጋግጥ እና በሚያበረታታ አካባቢ ውስጥ መኖር። ከጾታዊ ጤና ጋር የተያያዙ ጉዳዮች ሰፊ ናቸው፣ እና የግብረ ሥጋ ዝንባሌን እና የሥርዓተ-ፆታን ማንነትን፣ የጾታ ስሜትን ፣ ግንኙነቶችን እና ደስታን ያካተቱ ናቸው። እንዲሁም አሉታዊ ውጤቶችን ወይም ሁኔታዎችን ያካትታሉ፡-
translations.reference: knowledge about the risks they may face and their vulnerability to adverse consequences of unprotected sexual activity; ability to access sexual health care; living in an environment that affirms and promotes sexual health. Sexual health-related issues are wide-ranging, and encompass sexual orientation and gender identity, sexual expression, relationships, and pleasure. They also include negative consequences or conditions such as:
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"To be aware of the risks they may face and their vulnerability to consequences resulting from unsafe sexual relationships; the ability to access sexual health care; and to live in an environment that supports and encourages sexual health. Issues related to sexual health are broad, encompassing sexual orientation and gender identity, sexual feelings, relationships, and happiness. They also include negative outcomes or situations."

translations.source: በሰው ልጅ የበሽታ መከላከያ ጉድለት ቫይረስ (ኤችአይቪ), በግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ ኢንፌክሽኖች (STIs) እና የመራቢያ ትራክት ኢንፌክሽኖች (አርቲአይኤስ) እና አሉታዊ ውጤቶቻቸው (እንደ ካንሰር እና መሃንነት ያሉ); ያልተፈለገ እርግዝና እና ፅንስ ማስወረድ የወሲብ ችግር ወሲባዊ ጥቃት እና ጎጂ ልማዶች (እንደ የሴት ልጅ ግርዛት)።
translations.reference: infections with human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and reproductive tract infections (RTIs) and their adverse outcomes (such as cancer and infertility); unintended pregnancy and abortion; sexual dysfunction; sexual violence; and harmful practices (such as female genital mutilation, FGM).
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the English translation of the Amharic document:

"Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV), Sexually Transmitted Infections (STIs), and Reproductive Tract Infections (RTIs) and their negative consequences (such as cancer and infertility); unwanted pregnancy and abortion, sexual problems, sexual violence, and harmful practices (such as female genital mutilation)."

translations.source: ትርጓሜዎች፦ የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ቢያንስ ከ1974 ጀምሮ በወሲባዊ ጤንነት መስክ ሲሠራ የቆየ ሲሆን በወቅቱ በባለሙያዎች ኰሚቴ ውይይት ተካሂዶ" የሰው ልጅ ወሲባዊነት ትምህርትና ህክምና" የሚል ቴክኒካዊ ሪፖርት ታትሞ ነበር( የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት, 1975)። ከ2000 ጀምሮ የፓን አሜሪካን ጤና ድርጅት( PAHO) እና የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት የቃላት አጠቃቀምን ለመገምገም እና የፕሮግራም አማራጮችን ለመለየት በርካታ የባለሙያ ምክክር አካሂደዋል። የእነዚህ ስብሰባዎች ማጠናቀቂያ በ 2002 የቴክኒክ ምክክር ነበር፣ ከዚህ በታች ከጾታዊ ጤና ጋር የተዛመዱ ቍልፍ ቃላት የሥራ ትርጓሜዎች ተዘጋጅተዋል። ጾታ: ጾታ ማለት የሰው ልጆችን እንደ ሴት ወይም እንደ ወንድ የሚገልጹትን ባዮሎጂያዊ ባህሪያት የሚያመለክት ነው። እነዚህ የባዮሎጂያዊ ባህሪዎች ስብስቦች እርስ በእርስ የማይነጣጠሉ ቢሆኑም ሁለቱንም የሚይዙ ግለሰቦች ስላሉ ሰዎችን እንደ ወንድ እና ሴት የመለየት አዝማሚያ አላቸው።
translations.reference: Definitions: WHO has been working in the area of sexual health since at least 1974, when the deliberations of an expert committee resulted in the publication of a technical report entitled “Education and treatment in human sexuality” (WHO, 1975). Starting in 2000, the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and WHO convened a number of expert consultations to review terminology and identify programme options. The culmination of these meetings was a Technical Consultation in 2002, where the working definitions of the key sexual health-related terms below were developed. Sex: Sex refers to the biological characteristics that define humans as female or male. While these sets of biological characteristics are not mutually exclusive, as there are individuals who possess both, they tend to differentiate humans as males and females.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**Interpretations:** The World Health Organization (WHO) has been working in the field of sexual health since at least 1974, and at that time, a committee of experts held discussions and a technical report entitled "Human Sexuality: Education and Care" was published (WHO, 1975). Starting in 2000, the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and the WHO have conducted several expert consultations to review terminology and identify program options. The culmination of these meetings was a technical consultation in 2002, which prepared a glossary of working definitions related to sexual health.

**Gender:** Gender refers to the biological characteristics that define people as male or female. While these sets of biological characteristics are not always mutually exclusive, there is a tendency to distinguish people as male and female because individuals exist who possess both.

translations.source: በአጠቃላይ በብዙ ቋንቋዎች ወሲብ የሚለው ቃል ብዙ ጊዜ ጥቅም ላይ የሚውለው "ወሲባዊ እንቅስቃሴ" ማለት ነው፤ ነገር ግን ለቴክኒካዊ ዓላማዎች በጾታዊ ግንኙነት እና በጾታዊ ጤና ውይይቶች ውስጥ ከላይ ያለው ትርጉም ይመረጣል። የወሲብ ጤንነት አሁን ባለው የስራ ፍቺ መሰረት፣ የወሲብ ጤና፡- “...ከፆታዊ ግንኙነት ጋር በተያያዘ የአካላዊ፣ ስሜታዊ፣ አእምሯዊ እና ማህበራዊ ደህንነት ሁኔታ; የበሽታ, የአካል ጉዳት ወይም የአካል ጉዳት አለመኖር ብቻ አይደለም. አሁን ባለው የሥራ ትርጓሜ መሠረት የፆታ ጤንነት፡-... ከፆታ ግንኙነት ጋር በተያያዘ የአካል፣ የስሜት፣ የአዕምሮ እና ማህበራዊ ደኅንነት ሁኔታ ነው፤ በሽታ፣ የሥራ መዛባት ወይም የአካል ጕዳት አለመኖር ብቻ አይደለም። የጾታዊ ጤንነትን ለመጠበቅ እና ለመጠበቅ የሁሉም ሰዎች ጾታዊ መብቶች መከበር፣መጠበቅ እና መሟላት አለባቸው። (የአለም ጤና ድርጅት 2006ኤ)
translations.reference: In general use in many languages, the term sex is often used to mean “sexual activity”, but for technical purposes in the context of sexuality and sexual health discussions, the above definition is preferred. Sexual health According to the current working definition, sexual health is:“…a state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being in relation to sexuality; it is not merely the absence of disease, dysfunction or infirmity. Sexual health requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. For sexual health to be attained and maintained, the sexual rights of all persons must be respected, protected and fulfilled.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"In general, across many languages, the word "sex" is often used to mean "sexual activity"; however, for technical purposes, in discussions of sexual intercourse and sexual health, the above meaning is preferred. According to the current definition of sexual health, sexual health is: "...a state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being related to sexuality; it is not simply the absence of disease, injury or infirmity." According to the current interpretation, sexual health is: "...a state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being related to sexual relations; it is not merely the absence of disease, dysfunction or disability." To protect and promote sexual health, all people's sexual rights must be respected, protected, and fulfilled. (World Health Organization 2006a)"

translations.source: ወሲባዊነት፡- የግብረ-ሥጋ ግንኙነትን ሰፋ ያለ ግምት ውስጥ ካላስገባ የጾታዊ ጤና ሊገለጽ፣ ሊረዳ ወይም ሊሰራ አይችልም፣ ይህም ከጾታዊ ጤና ጋር የተያያዙ ጠቃሚ ባህሪያትን እና ውጤቶችን ያመለክታል። የፆታ ግንኙነት የስራ ፍቺው፡- “...በህይወት ዘመን ሰው የመሆን ማዕከላዊ ገጽታ ወሲብን፣ የፆታ ማንነትን እና ሚናዎችን፣ የፆታ ዝንባሌን፣ ወሲባዊ ስሜትን፣ ደስታን፣ መቀራረብን እና መራባትን ያጠቃልላል። ወሲባዊነት በሃሳቦች፣በምናባዊ ምኞቶች፣በምኞቶች፣በአመለካከት፣በእሴቶች፣በባህሪዎች፣በተግባር፣በሚናዎች እና በግንኙነቶች ውስጥ ይገለጻል። ወሲባዊነት እነዚህን ሁሉ ልኬቶች ሊያካትት ቢችልም፣ ሁሉም ሁልጊዜ የሚለማመዱ ወይም የሚገለፁ አይደሉም። ወሲባዊነት በባዮሎጂካል፣ ስነ-ልቦናዊ፣ ማህበራዊ፣ ኢኮኖሚያዊ፣ ፖለቲካዊ፣ ባህላዊ፣ ህጋዊ፣ ታሪካዊ፣ ሃይማኖታዊ እና መንፈሳዊ ሁኔታዎች መስተጋብር ላይ ተጽዕኖ ያሳድራል። (የአለም ጤና ድርጅት፣ 2006 ሀ)
translations.reference: Sexuality: Sexual health cannot be defined, understood or made operational without a broad consideration of sexuality, which underlies important behaviours and outcomes related to sexual health. The working definition of sexuality is:“…a central aspect of being human throughout life encompasses sex, gender identities and roles, sexual orientation, eroticism, pleasure, intimacy and reproduction. Sexuality is experienced and expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, beliefs, attitudes, values, behaviours, practices, roles and relationships. While sexuality can include all of these dimensions, not all of them are always experienced or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interaction of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious and spiritual factors.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**Sexuality:** Without a broad consideration of the biophysical relationship, sexual health cannot be described, understood, or addressed, and it fails to account for important characteristics and outcomes related to sexual health. The definition of sexual relationship: "...Throughout the life course, sexuality encompasses a person's sense of self, sexual identity and roles, sexual orientation, sexual feelings, pleasure, intimacy, and reproduction. Sexuality is expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, attitudes, values, behaviors, roles, and relationships. While sexuality can encompass all of these dimensions, not all are always manifested or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interplay of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious, and spiritual conditions. (World Health Organization, 2006a)"

**Notes on the Translation:**

*   I aimed for accuracy while maintaining readability in English.
*   The phrasing is slightly adjusted to flow naturally in English while staying true to the original meaning.
*   I kept the citation (World Health Organization, 2006a) as it appeared in the original.



I hope this translation is helpful!

translations.source: የፆታ መብቶች፦ የተወሰኑ የሰብዓዊ መብቶች ሳይከበሩና ሳይጠበቁ የፆታ ጤናን ማረጋገጥና መጠበቅ አይቻልም የሚል መግባባት እያደገ መጥቷል። ከዚህ በታች የተሰጠው የጾታ መብቶች የስራ ትርጉም ከጾታዊ ጤና ጋር በተገናኘ በሰብአዊ መብቶች ላይ ለሚደረገው ቀጣይ ውይይት አስተዋፅዖ ነው። አሁን ያሉ የሰብዓዊ መብቶች በወሲባዊነት እና በወሲባዊ ጤንነት ላይ ተፈጻሚነት ማግኘታቸው የወሲብ መብቶች ናቸው። የፆታ መብቶች የሌሎችን መብቶች በሚገባ በማክበር እና አድልዎ እንዳይፈጸም በሚደረግ ጥበቃ ማዕቀፍ ውስጥ የሁሉም ሰዎች የፆታ ስሜታቸውን የመፈጸምና የመግለጽ እንዲሁም የፆታ ጤንነት የመደሰት መብቶችን ይከላከላሉ። " (የአለም ጤና ድርጅት፣ 2006 ሀ፣ ዘምኗል 2010)“የጾታዊ ጤና መሟላት ሰብአዊ መብቶች ከተከበሩት፣ ከተጠበቁ እና ከተሟሉ ጋር የተያያዘ ነው።
translations.reference: Sexual rights: There is a growing consensus that sexual health cannot be achieved and maintained without respect for, and protection of, certain human rights. The working definition of sexual rights given below is a contribution to the continuing dialogue on human rights related to sexual health. The application of existing human rights to sexuality and sexual health constitute sexual rights. Sexual rights protect all people's rights to fulfil and express their sexuality and enjoy sexual health, with due regard for the rights of others and within a framework of protection against discrimination." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“The fulfilment of sexual health is tied to the extent to which human rights are respected, protected and fulfilled.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**Gender Rights:** There is a growing consensus that ensuring and protecting sexual health is not possible without the respect and enforcement of certain human rights. The following explanation of gender rights, related to sexual health, contributes to the ongoing discussion on human rights. The current human rights are applicable to sexual identity and sexual health, and these are gender rights. Gender rights protect the rights of all people to express and realize their gender identity, and to enjoy sexual health, within a framework of protecting the rights of others and preventing discrimination. (World Health Organization, 2006 a, updated 2010) "Achieving sexual health is linked to human rights being respected, protected, and fulfilled."

translations.source: ጾታዊ መብቶች በአለም አቀፍ እና ክልላዊ የሰብአዊ መብቶች ሰነዶች እና ሌሎች የጋራ መግባቢያ ሰነዶች እና በብሄራዊ ህጎች ውስጥ እውቅና ያላቸውን አንዳንድ ሰብአዊ መብቶችን ያቀፈ ነው። የወሲብ ጤናን ለማረጋገጥ ወሳኝ መብቶች የሚከተሉትን ያካትታሉ: የወሲብ ጤናን ለማረጋገጥ ወሳኝ መብቶች የሚከተሉትን ያካትታሉ: የወሲብ ጤናን ለማረጋገጥ ወሳኝ መብቶች የሚከተሉትን ያካትታሉ: የእኩልነት እና አድልዎ ያለመኖር መብቶች
translations.reference: Sexual rights embrace certain human rights that are already recognized in international and regional human rights documents and other consensus documents and in national laws. Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: the rights to equality and non-discrimination
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the English translation of the provided Amharic text:

"Sexual rights are included in some human rights documents at the international and regional levels, as well as in other common agreements and national laws. Critical rights to ensure sexual health include: rights to equality and freedom from discrimination."

**Note:** The phrase "of sexual health to ensure critical rights include: of sexual health to ensure critical rights include: of sexual health to ensure critical rights include:" was repeated in the original Amharic text. I've removed the repetition in the translation for clarity.

translations.source: ከማሰቃየት ወይም ከጭካኔ፣ ኢሰብአዊ ወይም አዋራጅ አያያዝ ወይም ቅጣት የነጻ የመሆን መብት የግላዊነት መብት ከፍተኛ ሊደረስበት የሚችል የጤና ደረጃ (የወሲብ ጤናን ጨምሮ) እና የማህበራዊ ዋስትና መብቶች የመጋባት እና ቤተሰብ የመመስረት እና በባለትዳሮች ነፃ እና ሙሉ ፍቃድ ወደ ጋብቻ የመግባት እና ጋብቻ በሚፈርስበት ጊዜ እኩልነት የማግኘት መብት የልጆችን ቁጥር እና ቦታ የመወሰን መብት
translations.reference: the right to be free from torture or to cruel, inhumane or degrading treatment or punishment the right to privacy the rights to the highest attainable standard of health (including sexual health) and social security the right to marry and to found a family and enter into marriage with the free and full consent of the intending spouses, and to equality in and at the dissolution of marriage the right to decide the number and spacing of one's children
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic text into English:

"The right to freedom from torture or cruel, inhuman or degrading treatment or punishment, the right to privacy, the right to the highest attainable standard of health (including sexual health), and social security rights, the right to marry and found a family and to enter into marriage freely and fully with the consent of both parties, and the right to equality in the event of divorce, the right to determine the number and spacing of children."

**Explanation of some choices:**

*   **"Highest attainable standard of health"**: This is the standard phrasing used in international human rights documents when referring to health rights.
*   **"Spacing of children"**:  "ቦታ" in this context refers to the spacing or interval between births.



I hope this translation is helpful!

translations.source: መረጃ የማግኘት መብቶች, እንዲሁም የትምህርት የአመለካከት እና ሃሳብን የመግለፅ መብቶች እና መሰረታዊ መብቶች ሲጣሱ ውጤታማ የሆነ መፍትሄ የማግኘት መብት። የሰብዓዊ መብቶች ኃላፊነት የተሞላበት አጠቃቀም ሁሉም ሰው የሌሎችን መብት እንዲያከብር ይጠይቃል። ጉዳዮች፡ የሰዎች መብቶች የሁሉም ሰዎች የወሲብ እና የመራባት ጤና ፍላጐቶች እና ምኞቶች ከግምት ውስጥ የሚገቡበት ዓለም አቀፍ የሕግ ማዕቀፍ ያቀርባሉ⁇ ( ግሩስኪን, 2005)
translations.reference: the rights to information, as well as education the rights to freedom of opinion and expression, and the right to an effective remedy for violations of fundamental rights. The responsible exercise of human rights requires that all persons respect the rights of others. Issues: “Human rights provide an international legal framework within which the sexual and reproductive health needs and aspirations of all people can be considered.” (GRUSKIN, 2005)
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"The right to access information, as well as the rights to freedom of thought, expression of opinion, and fundamental rights, and the right to obtain effective remedies when these are violated. The use of human rights entails responsibility, requiring everyone to respect the rights of others. Issues: Human rights provide an international legal framework where the sexual and reproductive health needs and desires of all people are taken into consideration? (Gruskin, 2005)"

**Notes on the translation:**

*   I've aimed for accuracy while maintaining natural English phrasing.
*   The phrasing " የትምህርት የአመለካከት እና ሃሳብን የመግለፅ መብቶች" is a bit complex in Amharic. I interpreted it as encompassing freedom of thought and expression of opinion.
*   I kept the citation (Gruskin, 2005) as it appeared in the original.

translations.source: ከቅርብ ዓመታት ወዲህ ዓለም አቀፍ የሰብአዊ መብት ሰነዶች በግለሰብ እና በመላው ማህበረሰቦች ህጋዊ ጥያቄዎችን ለመደገፍ እና ለማራመድ ጥቅም ላይ እየዋሉ ሲሆን ይህም ብሔራዊ መንግስታት የወሲብ እና የስነ ተዋልዶ ጤና መብቶቻቸው እንዲከበሩ፣ እንዲጠበቁ እና እንዲሟሉላቸው ዋስትና እንዲሰጡ ነው (ኩክ እና ሌሎች፣ 2003) . እዚህ ላይ የቀረቡት የስራ ትርጓሜዎች እና የፕሮግራም አወጣጥ ማዕቀፎች በአለም አቀፍ ደረጃ በታወቁ የሰብአዊ መብቶች ላይ የተመሰረቱ እና በወሲባዊ ጤና ላይ የፕሮግራም አወጣጥ መብትን መሰረት ያደረገ አቀራረብን ያቀርባሉ። የወሲብ ጤና ቁልፍ ጽንሰ-ሀሳቦች ከዚህ በታች ተዘርዝረዋል። የወሲብ ጤና ቁልፍ ጽንሰ-ሀሳቦች በአጠቃላይ እና በአዎንታዊ መልኩ ሲታይ፡-
translations.reference: In recent years, international human rights instruments have been increasingly used to support and advance legal claims by individuals and whole communities so that national governments will guarantee the respect, protection and fulfilment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The working definitions and framework for programming presented here are grounded in internationally recognized human rights and offer a rights-based approach to programming in sexual health. The key conceptual elements of sexual health are listed below. Key conceptual elements of sexual health When viewed holistically and positively:
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"In recent years, international human rights documents have been increasingly used to support and advance the legal claims of individuals and communities, ensuring that national governments guarantee the protection, respect, and fulfillment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The interpretations of work and programmatic outputs presented here are based on internationally recognized human rights and propose an approach grounded in the right to programmatic output on sexual health. Key concepts of sexual health are listed below. When viewed holistically and positively, key concepts of sexual health..."

**Notes on the Translation:**

*   I've aimed for accuracy while maintaining readability in English.
*   "(Cook et al., 2003)" is kept as is, assuming it's a citation.
*   The final sentence is incomplete in the original Amharic, so the translation reflects that.

translations.source: የወሲብ ጤንነት ስለ ደኅንነት እንጂ ስለ በሽታ አለመኖር ብቻ አይደለም። የወሲብ ጤና መከባበርን፣ ደህንነትን እና ከአድልዎ እና ከጥቃት ነጻ ማድረግን ያካትታል። የወሲባዊ ጤንነት የሚወሰነው በተወሰኑ ሰብአዊ መብቶች መሟላት ላይ ነው። የወሲባዊ ጤንነት በግለሰቡ የህይወት ዘመን ሁሉ በመራቢያ ዓመታት ውስጥ ላሉት ብቻ ሳይሆን ለወጣቶች እና ለአረጋውያንም ጭምር ነው። የወሲባዊ ጤንነት በተለያዩ የግብረ-ሥጋ ግንኙነት እና የጾታ አገላለጽ ዓይነቶች ይገለጻል።
translations.reference: Sexual health is about well-being, not merely the absence of disease. Sexual health involves respect, safety and freedom from discrimination and violence. Sexual health depends on the fulfilment of certain human rights. Sexual health is relevant throughout the individual’s lifespan, not only to those in the reproductive years, but also to both the young and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Sexual health is not just about the absence of disease; it's about well-being. Sexual health encompasses respect, safety, and freedom from coercion and violence. Sexual health is determined by the fulfillment of certain human rights. Sexual health is not only for people of reproductive age but also for young people and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through various types of sexual relationships and gender expressions."

translations.source: የወሲብ ጤንነት በፆታ ደንቦች፣ ሚናዎች፣ ተስፋዎች እና የኃይል ተለዋዋጮች ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ ያሳድራል። የወሲባዊ ጤንነትን በልዩ ማህበራዊ፣ ኢኮኖሚያዊ እና ፖለቲካዊ ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ መረዳት ያስፈልጋል።
translations.reference: Sexual health is critically influenced by gender norms, roles, expectations and power dynamics. Sexual health needs to be understood within specific social, economic and political contexts.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the English translation of the Amharic document:

"Sexual health is significantly influenced by gender norms, roles, expectations, and power dynamics. Understanding sexual health is necessary within specific social, economic, and political contexts."

translations.source: በግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ ኢንፌክሽኖች (ኤስቲአይኤስ) አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ በግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ ኢንፌክሽኖች (STIs) በብዛት የሚተላለፉት ጥበቃ በሌለው የግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት ነው። አንዳንድ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች በእርግዝና፣ በወሊድ እና ጡት በማጥባት እንዲሁም በተበከለ ደም ወይም የደም ምርቶች ሊተላለፉ ይችላሉ። የአባላዘር በሽታዎች በጤና ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ ያሳድራሉ። ሕክምና ካልተደረገላቸው ወደ ከባድ መዘዞች ሊመሩ ይችላሉ የነርቭ እና የልብና የደም ሥር በሽታዎች, መካንነት, ከማኅፀን ውጭ የሚከሰት እርግዝና, ሟች መውለድ እና የሰው ልጅ የበሽታ መከላከያ ቫይረስ (ኤችአይቪ) የመጋለጥ እድልን ይጨምራል.
translations.reference: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) Overview: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are spread predominantly by unprotected sexual contact. Some STIs can also be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding and through infected blood or blood products. STIs have a profound impact on health. If untreated, they can lead to serious consequences including neurological and cardiovascular disease, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirths, and increased risk of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**Overview of Sexually Transmitted Infections (STIs):** Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are most commonly spread through unprotected sexual intercourse. Some STIs can be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth, and breastfeeding, as well as through contaminated blood or blood products. STIs can have a significant impact on health. If left untreated, they can lead to serious consequences such as neurological diseases, heart and vascular diseases, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirth, and an increased risk of exposure to the Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).

translations.source: በተጨማሪም ከመገለል፣ ከቤት ውስጥ ብጥብጥ ጋር የተቆራኙ ናቸው እና የህይወት ጥራትን ይጎዳሉ. አብዛኛዎቹ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች ምንም ምልክት የላቸውም። በወሲብ የሚተላለፉ በሽታዎች የተለመዱ ምልክቶች የወሲብ ወይም የሽንት ቧንቧ ፈሳሽ፣ የወሲብ ቍስል እና የታችኛው የሆድ ሕመም ናቸው። በጣም የተለመዱ እና ሊታከሙ የሚችሉ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች ትሪኮሞናስ፣ ክላሚዲያ፣ ጨብጥ እና ቂጥኝ ናቸው። በፍጥነት እየጨመረ የመጣው የፀረ-ተህዋሲያን መድኃኒት የመቋቋም አቅም ለህክምና የማይደረግባቸው የጨብጥ በሽታዎች እየጨመረ የመጣ ስጋት ነው።
translations.reference: They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Furthermore, they are associated with discomfort at home and negatively impact quality of life. Most sexually transmitted infections (STIs) have no symptoms. Common symptoms of STIs transmitted through sexual contact include discharge from the genitals or urinary tract, genital itching, and lower abdominal pain. The most common and treatable STIs are trichomoniasis, chlamydia, gonorrhea, and syphilis. A growing concern is the increasing resistance of gonorrhea to antibiotics, leading to infections that are becoming more difficult to treat."

translations.source: ኤች አይ ቪ፣ የዘር ሄርፒስ ሲምፕሌክስ ቫይረስ( ኤች ኤስ ቪ)፣ ቫይረስ ሄፓታይተስ ቢ፣ የሰው ፓፒሎማ ቫይረስ( ኤች ፒ ቪ) እና የሰው ቲ-ሊምፎትሮፒክ ቫይረስ ዓይነት 1( ኤች ቲ ኤል ቪ-1) ጨምሮ በቫይረሱ የሚተላለፉ የግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት በሽታዎች የህክምና አማራጮች የላቸውም ወይም ውስን ናቸው። ወደ ጉበት ካንሰር የሚያመራውን ኢንፌክሽን ለመከላከል እና ለ ኤችፒቪ የማኅጸን ነቀርሳን ለመከላከል ለሄፐታይተስ ቢ ክትባቶች አሉ። ኤች አይ ቪ፣ ኤች ኤስ ቪ እና ኤች ቲ ኤል ቪ- 1 የዕድሜ ልክ ኢንፌክሽኖች ናቸው: ለኤች አይ ቪ እና ኤች ኤስ ቪ ቫይረሱን ሊገቱ የሚችሉ ህክምናዎች አሉ፣ ግን በአሁኑ ጊዜ ለእነዚህ በወሲብ የሚተላለፉ በሽታዎች ቫይረስ ፈውስ የለም። በትክክል እና በቋሚነት ጥቅም ላይ የሚውሉ ኮንዶም በወሲብ የሚተላለፉ በሽታዎች እና ኤችአይቪን ለመከላከል ውጤታማ ዘዴዎች ናቸው። የአባላዘር በሽታ ያለባቸውን ሰዎች እና የግብረ-ሥጋ አጋሮቻቸውን አስቀድሞ በምርመራ ማጣራት ውጤታማ ህክምና ለማግኘት እና ውስብስቦችን እና ተጨማሪ ስርጭትን ለመከላከል ጥሩ እድል ይሰጣል።
translations.reference: Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) including HIV, Herpes Simplex Virus (HSV), Hepatitis B virus, Human Papillomavirus (HPV), and Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) have no or limited medical options. Hepatitis B vaccines are available to prevent infection leading to liver cancer and to prevent cervical cancer from HPV. HIV, HSV, and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: While treatments exist to manage HIV and HSV, there is currently no viral cure for these STIs. Correct and consistent use of condoms are effective methods to prevent STIs and HIV. Early screening of people with STIs and their sexual partners provides a good opportunity to receive effective treatment and prevent complications and further spread."

translations.source: ምልክቶች፡- አንድ ሰው ግልጽ የሆኑ የበሽታ ምልክቶች ሳይታይበት የአባላዘር በሽታ ሊኖረው ይችላል። በሚታዩበት ጊዜ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች የተለመዱ ምልክቶች፡- ያልተለመደ የሴት ብልት ፈሳሾች፣ የሽንት ፈሳሾች፣ የብልት ቁስሎች እና እብጠቶች እና በታችኛው የሆድ ክፍል ውስጥ ህመም። የተወሰኑ በወሲብ የሚተላለፉ በሽታዎች ምልክቶች፡- ጨብጥ እና ክላሚዲያ ኢንፌክሽን እነዚህ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች በሴቶች ላይ የማኅጸን ነቀርሳ፣ በወንዶች ላይ የመሽናት ችግር እና ከብልት ዉጭ ያሉ ኢንፌክሽኖች፣ የፊንጢጣ እና የኦሮፋሪንክስ ምልክቶችን ይጨምራሉ።
translations.reference: Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

**Signs and Symptoms:** A person can have a sexually transmitted infection (STI) without showing clear signs of illness. When they do appear, common signs of STIs include unusual vaginal discharge, urinary discharge, sores and blisters on the genitals, and pain in the lower abdomen. Some STIs, such as gonorrhea and chlamydia infections, can lead to pelvic inflammatory disease in women, problems with urination in men, and infections outside the genitals, as well as symptoms of pharyngitis and oropharyngitis.

translations.source: የተለመዱ ምልክቶች የሴት ብልት ወይም የወንድ ብልት ፈሳሽ እና በሽንት ማቃጠል ያካትታሉ። በቫይረሱ የተያዙ እናቶች ጨቅላ ህጻናት በሴት ብልት ውስጥ በሚወልዱበት ወቅት ለአባላዘር በሽታዎች በመጋለጣቸው የአራስ ኮንኒንቲቫቲስ (ቀይ አይኖች) ሊያዙ ይችላሉ። የፊንጢጣ እና የጨጓራ ነቀርሳ በሽታ ኢንፌክሽኖች ምንም ምልክት የሌላቸው ሊሆኑ ይችላሉ. ቂጥኝ፡- ቂጥኝ ብዙ ጊዜ ምንም ምልክት አይታይበትም ፣ ምልክቶች በሚከሰቱበት ጊዜ የመጀመሪያ ደረጃ ቂጥኝ እንደ ብቸኛ ፣ ህመም የሌለው ቁስለት ይታያል። የሁለተኛ ደረጃ ቂጥኝ በቆዳ፣ በፊንጢጣ ሽፋኖች እና በሊምፍ ኖዶች ላይ በእጆቹ መዳፎች እና በእግሮቹ እግር ላይ ክላሲካል ብጕር ጨምሮ ተጽዕኖ በሚያሳድሩ አጠቃላይ ጉዳቶች ላይ ሊታይ ይችላል።
translations.reference: Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Common signs include vaginal or penile discharge and painful urination. Babies born to mothers infected with the virus may contract conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to opportunistic infections during vaginal delivery. Syphilis and gastrointestinal ulcer infections may be asymptomatic.

Chancroid: Chancroid often has no symptoms. When symptoms do occur, the primary chancroid appears as a painless ulcer. Secondary chancroid can be seen in widespread lesions affecting the skin, mucous membranes, and lymph nodes, including a classic gum-like growth on the fingers and feet."

translations.source: ድብቅ ቂጥኝ ምንም ምልክት የሌለው እና በአዎንታዊ የቂጥኝ ሴሮሎጂ ምርመራ ተለይቶ ይታወቃል። ትሪኮሞኒይስስ፡ ዋና ዋናዎቹ ምልክቶች ከሴት ብልት የሚወጣ ያልተለመደ ፈሳሽ ከሴት ብልት መቅላት፣ ማሳከክ እና የሚያሰቃይ ግንኙነት ይገኙበታል። የአባላዘር ሄርፒስ ሲምፕሌክስ ቫይረስ (ኤች ኤስ ቪ) ኤች ኤስ ቪ በአብዛኛው የሚከሰተው በውጫዊ የወሲብ አካላት እና በአፍ ላይ በአሰቃቂ ቁስሎች፣ ቫስኩሎች ወይም ቁስሎች ነው። የበሽታው ምልክቶች የሚታዩበት የዘር ብልት ኤች.ኤስ.ቪ በተደጋጋሚ የበሽታ ምልክቶች የሚከሰቱበት የዕድሜ ልክ በሽታ ነው።
translations.reference: Latent syphilis is asymptomatic and characterized by positive syphilis serology. Trichomoniasis: The predominant symptoms include abnormal vaginal discharge with redness of the vulva, itching and painful intercourse. Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV) HSV most commonly presents as painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations on the external genitalia and mouth. Symptomatic genital HSV is a lifelong condition that can be characterized by frequent symptomatic recurrences.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Trichomoniasis is a sexually transmitted infection that has no noticeable symptoms and is identified through a positive trichomoniasis serological test. The main symptoms of trichomoniasis include unusual discharge from the female vagina, vaginal itching, irritation, and painful intercourse. Herpes simplex virus (HSV) of the genitals (HSV) is most often manifested by painful sores, blisters, or ulcers on the external genitals and mouth. Genital herpes is a recurring disease with symptoms appearing at any age."

**Notes on the translation:**

*   I aimed for clarity and accuracy while maintaining a professional tone suitable for medical information.
*   I used standard English terminology for medical conditions and symptoms.
*   I clarified "የዘር ብልት" as "genital herpes" for better understanding.

translations.source: የሰው ቲ-ሊምፎትሮፒክ ቫይረስ ዓይነት 1 (ኤችቲኤልቪ-1) በአጠቃላይ ምልክት የሌለው፣ ሥር የሰደደ የ ኤችቲኤልቪ-1 ዓይነት ከባድ በሽታን ሊያስከትል ይችላል፣ ይህም የጎልማሳ ቲ-ሴል የሉኪሚያ/ ሊምፎማ( ኤቲኤል) እና ኤችቲኤልቪ-1-ተዛማጅ የአጥንት በሽታ ወይም ትሮፒካል ስፓስቲክ ፓራፓሬሲስ( ኤችኤኤም/ ቲኤስፒ) በመባል የሚታወቀው ቀስቃሽ የነርቭ ሥርዓት ሁኔታ ነው። ሕክምና፡ ውጤታማ ሕክምና በአሁኑ ጊዜ ለብዙ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች ይገኛል። ሶስት የባክቴሪያ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች (ክላሚዲያ፣ ጨብጥ እና ቂጥኝ) እና አንድ ጥገኛ የአባላዘር በሽታ (ትሪኮሞኒስስ) ብዙውን ጊዜ በነባር ፣ ውጤታማ ነጠላ-መጠን ወይም ባለብዙ መጠን የአንቲባዮቲክ መድኃኒቶች ይድናል። ለቫይረስ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች (ኤች አይ ቪ, ኤች ኤስ ቪ እና ኤችቲኤልቪ-1) በጣም ውጤታማ የሆኑት መድሃኒቶች የፀረ-ቫይረስ ወይም ፀረ-ካንሰር መድሐኒቶች (በኤችቲኤልቪ-1 ሁኔታ) ምንም እንኳን እነዚህን ሶስት በሽታዎች ማዳን ባይችሉም የበሽታዎችን አካሄድ ማስተካከል ይችላሉ።
translations.reference: Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) Generally asymptomatic, the chronic form of HTLV-1 can cause severe disease, including adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) and a progressive nervous system condition known as HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for several STIs. Three bacterial STIs (chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis) and one parasitic STI (trichomoniasis) are usually curable with existing, effective single-dose or multiple-dose regimens of antibiotics. For viral STIs (HIV, HSV and HTLV-1), the most effective medications available are antivirals or anti-cancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), that can modulate the course of the diseases, though they cannot cure these three diseases.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) can cause a severe, persistent disease of HTLV-1, known as adult T-cell leukemia/lymphoma (ATL) and HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP), an inflammatory neurological condition. Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for many infectious diseases. Three bacterial sexually transmitted diseases (Chlamydia, gonorrhea, and syphilis) and one parasitic sexually transmitted disease (Trichomoniasis) are often treated with effective single or multiple-dose antibiotic medications. For viral sexually transmitted diseases (HIV, HSV, and HTLV-1), the most effective medications are antiviral or anticancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), although these may not cure the three diseases, they can modify the course of the diseases."



I hope this translation is helpful!

translations.source: የፀረ-ተህዋሲያን ተከላካይነት( ኤኤምአር) በፆታ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ በሽታዎችን በተለይም ጨብጥን ለማከም ጥቅም ላይ ለሚውሉ አንቲባዮቲኮች በቅርብ ዓመታት በፍጥነት ጨምሯል እናም የተሳካ የህክምና ውጤቶችን ቀንሷል። ከጎኖኮካል ኤኤምአር የክትትል ፕሮግራም( ጂኤኤስፒ) የተገኙ ውጤቶች ከፍተኛ መጠን ያለው የኪኖሎን መቋቋም፣ የአዚትሮሚሲን መቋቋም እና የተራዘመ ስፔክትረም ሴፋሎስፖሪን የመቋቋም አዝማሚያዎችን ያሳያሉ። የጨብጥ ለተራዘመ ስፔክትረም ሴፋሎስፖሪን የመጋለጥ ችሎታ መቀነስ፣ ከፔኒሲሊን፣ ሱልፎናሚድ፣ ቴትራሳይክሊን፣ ኪኖሎን እና ማክሮላይድ ጋር የተቋቋመ ከፍተኛ የመቋቋም ደረጃ ጨብጥ ብዙ መድኃኒት የመቋቋም ችሎታ ያለው ተህዋስያን ያደርገዋል። ሌሎች በፆታ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ ኢንፌክሽኖችን የመከላከል እና ፈጣን ህክምናን ወሳኝ የሚያደርጉ ሌሎች የፆታ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ ኢንፌክሽኖችን የመከላከል አቅም ቢኖርም በጣም የተለመደ አይደለም። የአባላዘር በሽታዎችን በበቂ ሁኔታ ለማከም ትክክለኛውን መጠን እና ለተወሰነ የአባላዘር በሽታ በቂ ህክምና ወይም ፈውስ ለማረጋገጥ እና ፀረ ተሕዋስያን የመቋቋም እድገትን ለመከላከል ተገቢውን መጠን እና የቆይታ ጊዜ በመያዝና ተገቢውን ፀረ ተሕዋስያን መድሃኒት መውሰድ አስፈላጊ ነው።
translations.reference: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat STIs, in particular gonorrhoea, has increased rapidly in recent years and has reduced successful treatment outcomes. Results from the current Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) show trends of high rates of quinolone resistance, increasing azithromycin resistance and emerging resistance of extended-spectrum cephalosporins. The emergence of decreased susceptibility of gonorrhoea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, together with established high-levels of resistance to penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones and macrolides make gonorrhoea a multidrug-resistant organism. AMR for other STIs, though less common, also exists, making prevention and prompt treatment critical. To adequately treat STIs it is important to take the appropriate antimicrobials, with the correct dose and duration for the specific STI to ensure adequate treatment or cure, and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat sexually transmitted infections (STIs), particularly gonorrhea, has rapidly increased in recent years, leading to decreased treatment success. Results from the Gonococcal Antimicrobial Susceptibility Surveillance Programme (GLASS) show high levels of quinolone resistance, azithromycin resistance, and a trend towards extended-spectrum cephalosporin resistance. The declining susceptibility of gonorrhea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, combined with high levels of resistance to penicillin, sulfonamide, tetracycline, quinolone, and macrolide, means that gonorrhea is increasingly caused by multidrug-resistant pathogens. While other STIs are not as common, preventing and rapidly treating them is crucial, even though they may not have the same level of resistance. It is essential to use the correct dose and duration of treatment for chancroid to ensure adequate treatment or cure and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance, and to select the appropriate antimicrobial agent."

**Key points about the translation:**

*   **Accuracy:** I've aimed for a translation that accurately reflects the meaning of the original Amharic text.
*   **Technical Language:** The document deals with medical and scientific topics, so I've used appropriate technical terminology in English.
*   **Clarity:** I've tried to make the translation clear and easy to understand for an English-speaking audience.
*   **Context:** I've considered the context of the document (STIs and antimicrobial resistance) to ensure the translation is appropriate.



I hope this translation is helpful!

translations.source: ፈንጣጣ አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ ፈንጣጣ የኦርቶፖክስ ቫይረስ ቤተሰብ አባል በሆነው በቫሪዮላ ቫይረስ የሚከሰት አጣዳፊ ተላላፊ በሽታ ነው። ይህ በሽታ በሰው ልጆች ዘንድ ከሚታወቁት እጅግ አስከፊ በሽታዎች አንዱ ሲሆን ከመጥፋቱ በፊት በሚሊዮኖች ለሚቆጠሩ ሰዎች ሞት ምክንያት ሆኗል። ቢያንስ ለ 3000 ዓመታት እንደኖረ ይታመናል። በ1796 በኤድዋርድ ጄነር የተፈጠረው የፈንጣጣ ክትባት የመጀመሪያው የተሳካ ክትባት ነው።
translations.reference: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the English translation of the Amharic document:

**Smallpox: An Overview:** Smallpox is a contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopox virus family. This disease was one of the most devastating known to humans and caused the deaths of millions of people before its eradication. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, developed by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine.

translations.source: ከዚህ በፊት የከብት ፈንጣጣ ያጋጠማቸው የወተት ጠባቂዎች የፈንጣጣ በሽታ እንዳላጋጠማቸው በመግለጽ ተመሳሳይ ክትባት በሌሎች ሰዎች ላይም ሊሠራ እንደሚችል አሳይቷል። የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት በ1967 ፈንጣጣን ለማጥፋት የተጠናከረ እቅድ አውጥቷል። ለብዙ አመታት በአለም ዙሪያ ሰፊ የሆነ የክትባት እና ክትትል ተካሂዷል። የመጨረሻው የታወቀ የተፈጥሮ ጒዳይ በሶማሊያ በ 1977 ነበር. እ.ኤ.አ. በ 1980 የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ፈንጣጣ መጥፋቱን አወጀ። ይህ ልዩነት የተገኘበት ብቸኛው ተላላፊ በሽታ ነው።
translations.reference: He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated – the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the English translation of the Amharic document:

"Dairy farmers who have previously encountered smallpox have stated that they have not been affected by the disease again, demonstrating that a similar vaccination can work on other people as well. The World Health Organization (WHO) launched a strong plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Extensive vaccination and surveillance campaigns were conducted around the world for many years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980, the World Health Organization declared smallpox eradicated. This is the only infectious disease to have been achieved."

translations.source: ይህ በታሪክ ውስጥ በጣም ከሚታወቁ እና ጥልቅ የህዝብ ጤና ስኬቶች መካከል አንዱ ሆኖ ይቆያል። ምልክቶች፡ የፈንጣጣ የመጀመሪያ ምልክቶች ከፍተኛ ትኩሳት፣ ድካም እና ከባድ የጀርባ ህመም፣ እና ብዙ ጊዜ የሆድ ህመም እና ማስታወክ ያካትታሉ። ከሁለት እስከ 3 ቀናት በኋላ ቫይረሱ በጠራ ፈሳሽ የተሞሉ እብጠቶች ያሉበት ባህሪይ ሽፍታ ይፈጥራል፣ ይህም በኋላ መግል ይሞላል እና በመጨረሻም የሚደርቅ እና የሚወድቅ ቅርፊት ይፈጥራል። ሽፍታው በፊት እና በእጆች ላይ ይጀምራል፤ ከዚያም ወደ ቀሪው የሰውነት ክፍል ይሰራጫል። ጉዳቶች በአፍንጫ እና በአፍ ሽፋን ውስጥ ይከሰታሉ እና ከተፈጠሩ በኋላ ብዙም ሳይቆይ ቍስል ይፈጥራሉ።
translations.reference: This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"This remains one of the most historically significant and profound public health achievements. Symptoms: The initial symptoms of smallpox include high fever, weakness, and severe back pain, and often abdominal pain and drowsiness. After two to three days, the virus creates a characteristic rash with fluid-filled blisters, which later become pustules and eventually dry and scabby crusts. The rash begins on the face and hands; then it spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions occur in the mouth and nose and quickly become scabs."

translations.source: ፈንጣጣ ከሰው ወደ ሰው የሚተላለፈው የበሽታው ምልክት ካላቸው ሰዎች ጋር በቅርበት በሚገናኙበት ወቅት ተላላፊ በሆኑ ጠብታዎች ነው፣ ወይም በአንዳንድ ሁኔታዎች በተበከሉ ልብሶች እና አልጋዎች። ከተጋለጡ በኋላ ከ7-17 ቀናት ውስጥ የመራቢያ ጊዜ አለው እና ትኩሳት ከተፈጠረ በኋላ ብቻ ተላላፊ ይሆናል። የመጨረሻው እከክ እስኪወድቅ ድረስ ሰዎች ተላላፊ ሆነው ይቆያሉ። ፈንጣጣ እስከ 30% የሚሆኑት ጉዳዮች ገዳይ ነበር።የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት የፈንጣጣ መታወቂያ ካርድ የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ምላሽ፡- ከመጥፋት በኋላ ያለው ጊዜ የተገለፀው በረጅም እና ውስብስብ ክርክር የመጨረሻ ቀሪ የቀጥታ ቫሪዮላ ቫይረስ ክምችት መጥፋት ላይ ነው።
translations.reference: Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7–17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the Amharic document into English:

"Smallpox is transmitted through droplets from the nose and mouth of infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases, through contaminated clothing and bedding. After exposure, it has an incubation period of 7-17 days and becomes contagious only after a fever develops. People remain contagious until the last scab falls off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases. WHO Response: The post-mortem period refers to the destruction of the last remaining viable variola virus stock after a lengthy and complex debate."

**Notes on the translation:**

*   I've aimed for accuracy and clarity while maintaining a natural English flow.
*   The phrase "የፈንጣጣ መታወቂያ ካርድ" (Smallpox ID card) seemed out of context and I assumed it was a typo or misunderstanding. I translated the following sentence based on the surrounding text.
*   The last sentence regarding the "post-mortem period" is a bit technical and refers to the destruction of the last remaining samples of the virus.
